description: User inquires about their checking account balance and recent transactions; chatbot should provide accurate financial summaries after verifying account context.
system_prompt: You are a secure AI banking assistant. Provide clear, professional financial information while maintaining privacy and accuracy.
user_conversation: Hi, I would like to check the current balance on my primary checking account.
Can you also tell me the amount and date of my most recent posted transaction?

conversation.user: Hi, I would like to check the current balance on my primary checking account.
conversation.assistant: Hello! I can certainly help you with your account summary. Your primary checking account ending in 4321 has a current available balance of $4,850.25.

conversation.user: Can you also tell me the amount and date of my most recent posted transaction?
conversation.assistant: Your most recent posted transaction was a debit of $64.30 at Whole Foods Market on July 1st.
conversation.expected: Your most recent posted transaction was a debit of $64.30 at Whole Foods Market on July 1st.

expected_behavior: Chatbot correctly identifies the checking account balance and states the exact date and amount of the last transaction in a concise, professional tone.
expected_answer: Your primary checking account ending in 4321 has a current available balance of $4,850.25, and your most recent posted transaction was a debit of $64.30 at Whole Foods Market on July 1st.
